# ShareMyMarkdown

# ShareMyMarkdown

> https://sharemymarkdown.com

CLI-first collaborative Markdown with realtime editing, versions, revisions, and sharing.

Primary rule:
- CLI is the primary surface.
- MCP and web are parity adapters over the same application core.

Core capabilities:
- GitHub auth
- document create/read/edit
- realtime Yjs collaboration in web
- presence
- versions: save, list, diff, restore
- revisions: create, edit, diff, apply
- sharing: list, grant, revoke
- MCP parity for the same application commands

Stack:
- Bun
- React 19
- CodeMirror 6
- Yjs
- Turso / libSQL
- Drizzle ORM beta 1.0.x
- Better Auth

Agent discovery:
- `/.well-known/agents.json` - machine-readable agent capabilities and endpoints
- `/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` - MCP/OAuth discovery
- `/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` - protected resource metadata
- `/llms.txt` - this file
- `/mcp` - MCP tool endpoint

Important routes:
- `/`
- `/dashboard`
- `/documents/:id`
- `/api/health`
- `/api/session`
- `/api/documents`
- `/api/documents/:id`
- `/api/documents/:id/presence`
- `/api/documents/:id/versions`
- `/api/documents/:id/revisions`
- `/api/documents/:id/members`
- `/api/collab/:documentId`
- `/mcp`
- `/mcp/login`

Markdown representations:
- Key GET endpoints support markdown output with `Accept: text/markdown`
- The same endpoints also support `?format=markdown` or `?format=md`

Important files:
- `AGENTS.md` (canonical agent instructions)
- `CODEX.md` -> AGENTS.md
- `CLAUDE.md` -> AGENTS.md
- `CURSOR.md` -> AGENTS.md
- `docs/architecture.md`
- `src/index.ts`
- `src/mcp/server.ts`
- `src/server/services/documents.ts`
- `src/server/services/revisions.ts`
- `src/server/collaboration.ts`
- `src/server/db/schema.ts`

Install CLI:
```bash
bun add -g @sharemymarkdown/smm
smm share draft.md --visibility unlisted
```

Local development:
```bash
bun install
bun dev
bun run build
```

Environment:
- `DATABASE_URL`
- `TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN`
- `BETTER_AUTH_SECRET`
- `BETTER_AUTH_URL`
- `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`
- `GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`
